src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace deprecated `com.microsoft.azure.sdk.iot.service` classes (RegistryManager, DeviceTwin) with the newer `com.microsoft.azure.sdk.iot.service.registry` and `com.microsoft.azure.sdk.iot.service.twin` APIs.
Update Device instantiation to use the new SDK constructor signature.
Refactor tag setting logic to use the new Twin API instead of DeviceTwinDevice and Pair sets.
Remove usage of Google Guava's Lists utility in favor of standard Java collections.
Update logger initialization to use MethodHandles for better performance and modern Java practices.
Add a new method to explicitly check for device existence, separating concerns from retrieval.
Add a method to log registry statistics using the new SDK API.
Change constructor injection to accept raw clients and strings instead of Spring-managed beans and properties objects.
Replace generic Exception catching with specific SDK exceptions and throw custom runtime exceptions.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: catch (IotHubException | IOException e) { throw new IotDeviceProviderException(...) }

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace Spring RestTemplate with a custom LoAdapter to decouple from Spring Web and use the new LiveObjects SDK.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Removed RestTemplate and HttpHeaders fields; added LoAdapter dependency and call loAdapter.sendCommand().

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Introduce Failsafe library for retry and fallback logic when sending commands.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added RetryPolicy<Void> dependency and wrapped command execution in Failsafe.with(...).run(...).

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Change send method return type from void to IotHubMessageResult to support Azure IoT Hub message acknowledgment.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Changed return type to IotHubMessageResult and return COMPLETE or REJECT based on success/failure.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Deserialize command string into CommandAddRequest object using Jackson ObjectMapper before sending.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added ObjectMapper dependency and used objectMapper.readValue(command, CommandAddRequest.class).

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger for error reporting instead of silent failure or Spring logging.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added static Logger LOG and LOG.error() call in catch block.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Remove @Component annotation as the class is no longer managed by Spring's component scan in the same way or is instantiated differently.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 8 to 21 to support modern language features and runtime.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.1.8 to 3.2.3, which requires Java 17+ and Jakarta EE 9+.
Add the new FIFO SDK for LiveObjects integration.
Add JitPack repository to resolve the new FIFO SDK dependency.
Upgrade Azure IoT Service Client from 1.18.0 to 2.1.7.
Upgrade Azure IoT Device Client from 1.18.0 to 2.4.1.
Upgrade Application Insights Spring Boot Starter from 2.5.1 to 2.6.4.
Upgrade Azure Spring Boot Metrics Starter from 2.2.1 to 2.3.5.
Add Spring Integration JMX support.
Add Maven Model dependency for build-time metadata access.
Add Apache Commons Text for string manipulation utilities.
Add Jodah Failsafe library for resilience patterns.
Add ArchUnit for architecture testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 integration for architecture testing.
Remove Spring Integration MQTT dependency, likely replaced by new SDK or logic.
Remove Guava dependency, likely replaced by standard Java or other libs.
Remove Azure Event Hubs dependency.
Add Maven Release Plugin for automated release management.
Remove Azure Web App Maven Plugin, likely moving to different deployment strategy.
Add SCM configuration for version control integration.
Add release profile with specific build configurations.
Add AppAssembler plugin for creating executable distributions.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add application-dev.yml to gitignore to prevent committing local development configuration.
Add /temp/ directory to gitignore to exclude temporary files from version control.

LICENSE.general_idea: Update the copyright holder in the license file from 'Live Objects' to 'Orange'.

README.md.general_idea: Reorganize README structure to include a table of contents and clearer section hierarchy.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Table of contents' and restructured headers into 'General info', 'Technologies', 'Requirements', etc.

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect new synchronization features (devices, messages, commands).
README.md.human_impl: Added bullet points describing devices, messages, and commands synchronization features.

README.md.general_idea: Document the specific technology versions used in the project.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Technologies' section listing Java 8, Spring Boot 2.4.4, and Azure SDK versions.

README.md.general_idea: Expand requirements to include Azure-specific resources like Application Insights and App Service Plans.
README.md.human_impl: Added list items for Application Insights resource and App Service plan creation.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify installation instructions by removing Azure Webapp Maven Plugin deployment steps.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Azure deployment instructions with generic 'Getting the installation package' and 'Installation' sections.

README.md.general_idea: Update configuration documentation to show the new application.yaml structure.
README.md.human_impl: Added code block showing 'tenant-list' and 'live-objects-properties' configuration.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Refactor application configuration from flat single-tenant structure to hierarchical multi-tenant and multi-Azure-IoT-Hub structure.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Replaced flat 'lo' and 'azure' keys with 'tenant-list' containing 'live-objects-properties' and 'azure-iot-hub-list' arrays.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Actuator management endpoints and Azure Monitor metrics export configuration.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Added 'management' section with endpoints exposure, health details, and azuremonitor metrics export settings.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Simplify Azure Application Insights configuration by removing legacy channel settings.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Removed 'channel' nested properties under 'azure.application-insights' and added 'enabled: true'.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add MIT license header comment to the logback configuration file.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added XML comment block with copyright and license text at the top of logback.xml.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Enable automatic reloading of the logback configuration file when it changes.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added scan="true" and scanPeriod="15 minutes" attributes to the <configuration> element.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Standardize the date format in the console logging pattern to include the full date.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Changed pattern from %d{HH:mm:ss.SSS} to %d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS} in STDOUT appender.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add a rolling file appender for INFO level logs to persist application events.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added FILE_INFO appender with RollingFileAppender, ThresholdFilter for INFO, and 7-day retention.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add a rolling file appender for all log levels to capture detailed debugging information.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added FILE_ALL appender with RollingFileAppender and 7-day retention.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Enable fine-grained logging for the Eclipse Paho MQTT client.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added logger entry for org.eclipse.paho.client.mqttv3 with level FINE.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Enable fine-grained logging for the Apache QPID Proton AMQP client.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added logger entries for org.apache.qpid and proton.trace with level FINE.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Route root logger output to the newly created file appenders.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.human_impl: Added appender-ref for FILE_INFO and FILE_ALL to the root logger.
